query:
UPDATE properties 
SET 
  totalValue = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 500000000
    WHEN 2 THEN 750000000
    WHEN 3 THEN 300000000
    WHEN 4 THEN 600000000
    WHEN 5 THEN 450000000
  END,
  availableValue = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 150000000
    WHEN 2 THEN 225000000
    WHEN 3 THEN 90000000
    WHEN 4 THEN 180000000
    WHEN 5 THEN 135000000
  END,
  sharePrice = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 10000
    WHEN 2 THEN 15000
    WHEN 3 THEN 6000
    WHEN 4 THEN 12000
    WHEN 5 THEN 9000
  END,
  totalShares = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 50000
    WHEN 2 THEN 50000
    WHEN 3 THEN 50000
    WHEN 4 THEN 50000
    WHEN 5 THEN 50000
  END,
  availableShares = CASE id
    WHEN 1 THEN 15000
    WHEN 2 THEN 15000
    WHEN 3 THEN 15000
    WHEN 4 THEN 15000
    WHEN 5 THEN 15000
  END,
  minimumInvestment = sharePrice
WHERE id IN (1, 2, 3, 4, 5)
